title: Does anyone randomly get really bad LB score (686)?
content: Most of the time, my submissions produce reasonable scores. But sometimes, I get a score of ~686. I think that in these cases kaggle kernel fails for some reason and submits the baseline values. Does anyone else have this problem? How to deal with it?

comments.content: did you predict unusually high values like NaN or very large numerics?

replies.content: No, I checked it. I think it was due to OOM issues.
